scenario.title: The Product Catalog Parser
scenario.context: Your e-commerce platform receives product descriptions from suppliers in various formats (email, PDF text, spreadsheet exports). You need to standardize them into a JSON array that your inventory system can process.
scenario.goal: Write a prompt that extracts multiple products from unstructured text and outputs a JSON array with nested objects for variants.
constraints: Output must be a JSON array of product objects
Each product needs: name, sku, price, category, variants[]
Variants are nested objects with: size, color, stock
scenario.exampleInput: New arrivals: Classic T-Shirt (SKU: TSH-001) - $29.99, Category: Apparel. Available in S/M/L, colors: Black (10 in stock), White (5 in stock). Also: Denim Jeans (SKU: JNS-002) - $79.99, Category: Apparel. Sizes 30/32/34, Blue only, 8 each.
hints: Show the nested structure with an example
Specify that price should be a number type
Define how to handle variants (combinations vs separate)

rubric.name: Array Structure
rubric.description: Is the array of objects structure clearly defined?

scoringGuide.excellent: Clear array specification with multiple item handling

rubric.name: Nested Objects
rubric.description: Are nested variant objects properly specified?

scoringGuide.excellent: Nested structure shown with example and all fields

rubric.name: Data Types
rubric.description: Are data types specified (number vs string)?

scoringGuide.excellent: Types explicitly defined for all fields
All fields, types, and edge cases covered

evaluatorContext.idealResponse:
Parse the following product description and return a JSON array of products.

Required structure:
```json
[
  {
    "name": "Product Name",
    "sku": "SKU-001",
    "price": 29.99,
    "category": "Category",
    "variants": [
      {
        "size": "M",
        "color": "Black",
        "stock": 10
      }
    ]
  }
]
```

Type requirements:
- price: number (not string) - e.g., 29.99 not "29.99"
- stock: integer
- All other fields: string

Variant rules:
- Create one variant object for each size+color combination
- If stock is per-size (not per color), distribute evenly or use the stated amount

Return ONLY the JSON array, no additional text.

Input text:
[product description here]
commonMistakes: Forgetting to specify price as number type
